equipment.artifact: Picture Diary Strategic Manual - Bloody Navy

character_buff.name: Mensa
character_buff.description: Max HP and ATK are increased according to INT stats of character.
character_buff.target: Family members within a range of 10m

effects: HP is increased by 50 per 1 INT stats
ATK is increased by 2% per 10 INT stats
HP is increased by 80 per 1 INT stats
ATK is increased by 2.5% per 10 INT stats

skills.name: Intensify
skills.description: Increases ATK of all team members.

skills.name: Fortify
skills.description: Increases Max HP of all team members. Not applied with [Acceleration] simultaneously.

skills.name: Acceleration
skills.description: Increases Attack/Move SPD of all team members. Not applied with [Fortify] simultaneously.

skills.name: Meditation
skills.description: Increases HP/SP Regen. of all team members.

effects: Remove harmful effect of own character

skills.name: Principal
skills.description: Provide basic buffs to team. The power can be doubled according to the circumstances.

skills.name: Melee Enhance
skills.description: Gives the buff that makes Melee Stance attack much stronger.

skills.name: Magic Enhance
skills.description: Gives the buff that makes Magic Stance attack much stronger.

skills.name: Shooting Enhance
skills.description: Gives the buff that makes Shoot Stance attack much stronger.

skills.name: Escape Artist
skills.description: Cancel darkness type curse on squad members as well as detect invisibility. Increase resistance of darkness type curse for a given time.

stances.name: Story Telling

skills.name: Wall of Curan
skills.description: Increases DEF of team members by realizing Wall of Curan.

effects: Damage received is reduced proportional to skill level
DEF increases proportional to skill level
HP increases proportional to skill level
[Wall of Curan] buff level decreases when hit by a skill attack.

skills.name: Fire of Chester
skills.description: Burn enemies by realizing Fire of Chester where the town burned to ashes by small mistake.

skills.name: Holy Sword of Richard
skills.description: Attack enemies by realizing Holy Sword of Richard which destroyed wall by one swing.
skills.target: Up to 12 enemies 15m away and within 5m width

skills.name: Beiren and the Grim Reaper
skills.description: Realizes Grim Reaper of Beiren and the Grim Reaper which is fairy tale of Bristia. Beiren worn cloth made of sand to cheat Grim Reaper which tried to bring Beirens life.

skills.name: Spear of Genos
skills.description: Judge enemies by realizing God of Wind, Thunderbolts of Genos in mythology of Bristia. Genos fights with God of Sea, Nefir and makes rainstorms.
skills.target: Up to 12 enemies 16m away and within 6m radius

lv25_bonus_extra: [RE: PvE] Skill DMG increases equal to 8% of extra [INT]
[PVP/PVE Maps] Additional 4% DMG according to extra [INT]
Ignore additional RES according to extra [INT] * 4
Additional DMG against Monster according to 4 * 50

skills.description: Installs a tactical trap. Upon casting, reduces the cooldown of all of your characters except [Additional Assist].
